description: The HyperlinkOpenDialog component shows in user space as a UIX when the user clicks on a HyperLink component.

fields._hyperlinkText: The text to fill with what is being accessed.
fields._reasonText: The text to show the reason for the link dialog showing.
fields._openButton: The button to open the link in ``URL`` using the user's OS default browser.

methods.Cancel: Cancel and don't open the link.

usage: Not used directly by the user.
